headline: The Bull Case For Packaging Corporation of America (PKG) Could Change Following Richmond Plant Closure Announcement
summary: Packaging Corporation of America has announced the closure of its Richmond, Virginia converting plant effective June 2026, affecting 110 employees, while maintaining operations at a nearby satellite warehouse in North Chesterfield. This operational shift, coinciding with fresh analyst coverage, raises questions about how plant consolidation and capacity decisions may influence the company’s longer-term positioning. We’ll now explore how the Richmond plant closure, and the capacity and cost...
